task: Keep the inspect JSON contract stable on the common-indicator baseline fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'uv run formbin inspect tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); assert data[\"record_count\"] == 5; assert data[\"records\"][1][\"kind\"] == \"descriptor\"; assert data[\"records\"][1][\"label\"] == \"form\"; assert data[\"records\"][3][\"kind\"] == \"module\"; assert data[\"records\"][4][\"kind\"] == \"form\"; assert data[\"records\"][4][\"size_policy\"] == \"mirror\""'
notes: Baseline CLI contract check for deterministic record parsing on the smallest verified fixture.

task: Keep no-op unpack/pack byte-identical on the common-indicator baseline fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" && uv run formbin pack "$tmpdir/unpack" -o "$tmpdir/repacked.Form.bin" && cmp -s tests/fixtures/common-indicator.Form.bin "$tmpdir/repacked.Form.bin"'
notes: End-to-end CLI confirmation for raw-first workspace generation and repack.

task: Keep the mirror-policy workflow healthy on common-print-form.
notes: Covers no-op roundtrip plus size-changing mirror-record edits on the larger verified fixture.

task: Keep diff and AST-backed diff behavior healthy on common-print-form.
verification: uv run formbin diff tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin
notes: Covers raw-first diff and the experimental AST render mode without using the holdout fixture.

task: Keep the experimental parse-form/build-form CLI roundtrip healthy on common-print-form.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin parse-form tests/fixtures/common-print-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/form.ast.json" && uv run formbin build-form "$tmpdir/form.ast.json" -o "$tmpdir/form.raw" && uv run formbin parse-form "$tmpdir/form.raw" -o "$tmpdir/reparsed.json" && cmp -s "$tmpdir/form.ast.json" "$tmpdir/reparsed.json"'
notes: Experimental AST smoke stays inside the main product pack because users can parse a form payload from the same `Form.bin` input.
